profiles.name: Blood Visionary
profiles.description: Default hostile Blood Raiders destroyer used by /npc, presented to the client as a real Blood Raiders destroyer entity.

profiles.name: Blood Bishop
profiles.description: Medium hostile Blood Raiders battlecruiser profile for weighted /npc spawning, presented as a Blood Raiders battlecruiser entity.

profiles.description: Heavy hostile Blood Raiders battleship profile for weighted /npc spawning, presented as a Blood Raiders battleship entity.

profiles.name: Dark Blood Apostle

profiles.name: Dread Pith Extinguisher
profiles.description: Heavy Guristas cruise-missile battleship profile for /mnpc and /npc guristas..., fitted with real Dread Guristas launcher hardware.

profiles.name: ORE Mining Venture
profiles.description: Passive diamond-style mining Venture used by the mining NPC fleet controller for belt mining choreography.

profiles.name: ORE Mining Retriever
profiles.description: Diamond-style Retriever used as a heavier miner in high-security and low-security NPC mining fleets.

profiles.name: ORE Mining Skiff
profiles.description: Diamond-style Skiff used as the tougher exhumer presence in low-security and null-security NPC mining fleets.

profiles.name: ORE Mining Hulk
profiles.description: Diamond-style Hulk used as the highest-yield miner in null-security NPC mining fleets.

profiles.name: ORE Mining Bestower Hauler
profiles.description: Diamond-style Bestower hauler used by high-security mining fleets to collect ore and depart off-grid between haul runs.

profiles.name: ORE Mining Badger Hauler
profiles.description: Diamond-style Badger hauler used by high-security mining fleets to collect ore and depart off-grid between haul runs.

profiles.name: ORE Mining Bustard Hauler
